name: Tardigrade
description: Extreme survival intelligence through cryptobiosis — suspending all metabolic processes to endure vacuum, radiation (1000x human lethal dose), temperatures from -272°C to 150°C, and pressures 6x ocean floor. Unique TDP proteins (tardigrade-specific disordered proteins) form protective glass matrices around cellular structures. Horizontal gene transfer from bacteria provides novel DNA repair mechanisms. Life that persists by temporarily becoming non-life.

core_attributes.neurology: simplified ganglionic chain with cryptobiotic shutdown
core_attributes.pattern: cryptobiosis, protein glass shielding, extreme DNA repair, metabolic suspension
